site_description: The PaN Training portal provides access to training resources for photon and neutron sciences.

content_types.description: Individual events or workshops offered as training opportunities.

navigation.description: Events are listed across multiple pages, accessible via pagination.

examples.title: HDF5 crash course
examples.description: This workshop will teach you the basics of the HDF5 data format.

examples.title: Introduction to Git and GitHub
examples.description: This workshop will give you a practical introduction to version control using Git and GitHub.

examples.title: Introduction to JupyterLab
examples.description: This workshop provides an overview of JupyterLab, its functionalities and how to use it for data analysis and scientific computing.

content_types.typical_structure: Each event has a title, a brief description, and a unique URL.

content_types.description: Reusable workflows for data analysis in photon and neutron sciences.

navigation.description: Workflows are listed on a single page.

examples.title: Workflow examples for EDXAS data analysis
examples.description: Workflow examples for EDXAS data analysis with Athena and Artemis.

examples.title: Analysis of Resonant X-ray Scattering data with pyqtgraph and numpy
examples.description: Workflow for analysis of Resonant X-ray Scattering data.

examples.title: Workflow for processing and fitting of XAS data
examples.description: This workflow presents an automated approach to processing and fitting XAS data using Demeter.

content_types.typical_structure: Each workflow has a title, a description of its purpose, and a URL.

content_types.description: Collections of learning resources, potentially including materials, tutorials, and other assets. These are sometimes referred to as 'Spaces'.

navigation.description: Resources are grouped into 'Spaces' and accessible through pagination.

examples.title: PaN Training
examples.description: Central hub for all PaN Training materials.

examples.title: NFDI4Culture
examples.description: Resources related to the NFDI4Culture project.

content_types.typical_structure: Each collection has a title, description, and a URL pointing to a page containing resources.
